item.title: A Megadump of Music from the '00s Airwaves
item.description:
Green Day - American Idiot (released 20 years ago today in 2004) And a handy dandy Spotify playlist to go with this dump - https://open.spotify.com/playlist/4xdV65TMAzduvJmsTh3MBh?si=zDcSzXwIQU-HeLVT4-HsTg
Kelly Clarkson - Since U Been Gone
Backstreet Boys - Everybody (Back Street's Back)
Missy Elliott (and Ludacris) - Gossip Folks
Vanessa Carlton - A Thousand Miles
Evanescence - Bring Me to Life https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3YxaaGgTQYM
The White Stripes - Seven Nation Army
Avril Lavigne - Sk8er Boi
Outkast - Hey Ya! https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=PWgvGjAhvIw
Sheryl Crow - Soak Up the Sun https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=KIYiGA_rIls
Christina Aguilera and Lil Kim - Can't Hold Us Down
Beyoncé (and Jay-Z) - Crazy in Love
John Rzeznik - I'm Still Here (from Treasure Planet)
Kelis - Milkshake
Eminem - Lose Yourself
P!nk - Get the Party Started (A Spotify playlist for the collection - https://open.spotify.com/playlist/0kmzsgxV7Oxc1RJVM96ATE ) Wayback in 73 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2rlT8Yh Wayback in 83 - https://imgur.com/gallery/T1CGaYx Wayback in 85 - https://imgur.com/gallery/lrddmXp Wayback in 88 - https://imgur.com/gallery/qBqeSu1 Wayback in 93 - https://imgur.com/gallery/tuAN3R4 Wayback in 95 - https://imgur.com/gallery/KkckKb3 Wayback in 98 - https://imgur.com/gallery/2qki0gA
Evanescence - My Immortal
Missy Elliot - Work It
Sertab Erener - Everyway That I Can (Turkey) 2003
Alizée - J'en Ai Marre
Beyoncé and Jay-Z - Bonnie and Clyde (featuring the late Lance Reddick)
Kylie Minogue - Spinning Around
Panjabi MC - Mundian To Bach Ke
Ashanti - Rock Wit U (Awww Baby)
U2 - The Hands That Built America
DMX - X Gonna Give it to Ya'
Fallout Boy - Grand Theft Autumn / Where is Your Boy?
No Doubt - It's My Life
Black Eyed Peas - Where is the Love?
Korn - Y'all Want a Single
Justin Timberlake - Cry Me a River
Shakira - Underneath Your Clothes
Michael Bublé - Sway
The Dixie Chicks - Landslide
Lil Kim - Magic Stick
Matchbox Twenty - Unwell
Britney Spears and Madonna - Me Against the Music
Robbie Williams - Come Undone
Linkin Park - Somewhere I Belong
Foo Fighters - Times Like These
Christina Aguilera - Beautiful
Beyoncé (and Sean Paul) - Baby Boy
Wyclef Jean and Missy Elliott - Party To Damascus
Ludacris - Stand Up
Mýa - My Love Is Like... Wo
The Ataris - The Boys of Summer
Elton John (and Blue) - Sorry Seems To Be The Hardest Word
Madonna - Die Another Day
Coldplay - Clocks
Jay-Z - 99 Problems
Clay Aiken - This is the Night
Red Hot Chili Peppers - Can't Stop
Limp Bizkit - Behind Blue Eyes
Alan Jackson and Jimmy Buffett - It's Five O' Clock Somewhere
Sugababes - Hole In The Head
Céline Dion - A New Day Has Come
Sean Paul - Like Glue
Dido - White Flag
Blink-182 - Miss You
The Strokes - Reptilia
Rachel Stevens - Sweet Dreams My L.A. Ex
Delta Goodrem - Lost Without You
Willie Nelson and Toby Keith - Beer For My Horses
The Darkness - I Believe in a Thing Called Love
The Roots - The Seed (2.0)
Queens Of The Stone Age - Go With The Flow
Snoop Dog and Pharrell - Beautiful
Counting Crows (and Vanessa Carlton) - Big Yellow Taxi
Electric Six - Danger! High Voltage!
Busta Rhymes and Mariah Carey - I Know What You Want
Three Days Grace - I Hate Everything About You
Simply Red - Sunrise
Nickleback - Someday
Chevelle - Send the Pain Below
Jason Mraz - The Remedy (I Won't Worry)
Chingy - Right Thurr
Aaliyah - Miss You https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=CJ6sHaL79J8
Jennifer Lopez - Jenny from the Block
Weird Al Yankovic - Couch Potato
Shania Twain - Forever and For Always
Annie Lennox - Into the West

item.title: trump wants to throw away The Constitution.
item.description:
He wants One Strong Man to be Americas First Dictator.......Traitor trump. mature for sensitive trump minions
trump WILL TRY A COUP AGAIN. So, don't be surprised. Hopefully our leaders will arrest n try him before more people die. God Save America.

item.title: In Honor Of My Husband
item.description:
Please give a warm welcome to my husband, @Pinetreedirigo who decided to join Imgur!
After many nights laying in bed, scrolling through memes while snuggling each other until we fall asleep,
he finally decided to join in the excitement.
He seems to love doggo memes in particular.
So here’s a dump for you, my love.
Welcome to Imgur!
Can’t wait to see your fresh memes.
Love you lots.
P.S.
What if we got a puppy?
;)
Just sayin’
You’d be as great of a dog dad as you are a human dad.
That is, you’re great with our beautiful baby.
Why not with a fur baby?
Okay, enjoy Imgur!
item.dc:creator: Uncommonminds

item.title: English can't be learned, you just get used to it
item.dc:creator: unknownkooli

item.title: Public concert [unmute]
item.description: If life seems jolly rotten There's something you've forgotten And that's to laugh and smile and dance and sing [ Eric Idle, "Always Look on the Bright Side of Life" 1979 ] I hope you smile or crack a mental smirk today, from this or an unrelated thing - even if only a brief moment. Cheers!!

item.title: It's time for yet another unhinged XL Sunday CeleryDump for the good & bad people of Imgur
item.description:
in love with one on the right.. greetings online friends
but what if they sold them in packages of the same size, would be silly
what a concept
dang sundress season is ending around here
this will make more sense if you've seen the classic film Maximum Overdrive.. (Stephen King written/directed)
1 stop shopping
unhinged
jair?
i can't see without my glasses
this wasn't necessary at all
dude's thumb is all kinds of fucked up
depends on the person kinda but i agree it's hyped up more than it should be
the good stuff
nothin wrong with that
i guess
mmm hmm
not again
that's my time.. have a great night gang!!
item.dc:creator: CeleryMan7

item.title: 3/5ths of an Oodle of Unmuted Faves
item.description:
Dan Docimo https://www.instagram.com/dandocimo/
Abby Jimenez https://www.authorabbyjimenez.com/
For anyone too young to get the reference because apparently it was 19 YEARS AGO WTF: https://www.thedrum.com/news/2022/06/14/world-s-best-ads-ever-42-sony-proves-it-has-color-no-other-with-250000-balls
Bad Lip Reading https://youtu.be/HBA7MA3qBM4
Philip Crowther https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Philip_Crowther
KestrelTapes https://www.youtube.com/@KestrelTapes --- For more unmuted faves just click on the #oodles tag.

item.title: In 2021, identical twin couples had baby boys at the same time, making them quaternary multiples. While technically cousins, they're genetically brothers since their parents are identical twins.
item.dc:creator: eskindt

item.title: Peppermint gel...
item.description: Sorry about the blank white space at bottom of video. If its bothering you too much pls apply some peppermint gel on your temples. You'll feel better.

Sangsoo Jeong
BaelohrsFantasyForge
Wiebke Rauers
Steven J. Levin
Seung Eun Kim
Julia Zhuravleva
Clint Cearley
Eduard Petrovich
Xabier Urrutia
Tasha Tikhonova
Matt Rhodes
浇汁儿的小胖子
Yang J.
Suggested Track Playlists: (HIT SHUFFLE) YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLoIzKPbKfwniKOaadw-tB8kaEQiUQ1Yp4 Spotify: https://open.spotify.com/playlist/6cqV52puia81vNnPHxcz1W?si=yoUknxpQQVql9E-NZRQ4 *TOGGLE MATURE CONTENT IN SETTINGS TO VIEW OUR POSTS* ICM SQUAD: @vazquezdaniel, @ohvalleyofplenty, @nichoDriver, @Dirgekins, @onewallpaperaweek, @thedownlowe, @TheForbiddenSemicolon, @bagoffishstix, @JayKillBam, @majkongskull, @DingoJ0nes, @HandsomePenguin, @MrJwinkyface, @Gorgoror, @ciadmillefailte, @kaeldra, @DerpyVaz ICM TIP JAR: https://www.patreon.com/InterwebChexMix Just to let you know, we do not take credit for any random art, comics, or photos featured in this collection; we only take credit for the daily effort of compiling the collections themselves. Like what we do and how we do it? Leave a tip. Or don't. It's totally cool either way. Stay True & Stay Tuned - Meta Pathos
item.dc:creator: MetaPathos

item.title: Ciri Cosplay by LittleLuckyCosplay
item.description:
Ciri Cosplay from The Witcher III
Entire cosplay made by me through sewing, 3D printing, foam crafting, and cursing. Zirael and the hip dagger were printed on a Creality Ender 3 while all the misc accents such as buckles, silver belt, and cat school medallion were printed on a combination of a Longer Orange and Elegoo Mars. (The Longer broke during this cosplay so I upgraded to Elegoo)
Scar effect achieved using rigid collodion, sfx makeup
Side by side comparison. I didn’t print/wear a wolf school medallion as she doesn’t wear it the majority of the game.
Plus one bonus meme-y pic to show how excited I was when I finished Zirael and wore everything together for the first time :)
item.dc:creator: LittleLuckyCosplay
